task_text: 处理收件箱中的下一条消息。

next_step.current_state: Starting mandatory identity bootstrap sequence before task-specific work.
next_step.observation: No workspace data has been loaded yet.

next_step.current_state: Tree succeeded and revealed root structure including AGENTS.MD at root and inbox item 00_inbox/311_next-task.md.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox processing workflow or next inbox message
next_step.observation: Listed filesystem tree from / and confirmed presence of /AGENTS.MD.

next_step.current_state: Root AGENTS.md read; must complete identity bootstrap by loading context.
next_step.observation: Read /AGENTS.MD and found rule requiring inspecting 99_system before task work.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (tree/read AGENTS/context). Now following root rule to inspect 99_system before task work.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read relevant workflow for processing next inbox item
Read inbox message and execute required action
next_step.observation: Loaded runtime context with current time 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z.

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system tree; now need nested rulebook before reading workflow details.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read workflow for next inbox item
next_step.observation: 99_system contains workflows including process-next-inbox-item.md and processing-inbox-email.md.

next_step.current_state: Read 99_system rulebook; next enter workflows folder and load its local AGENTS before the procedure doc.
next_step.observation: 99_system/AGENTS.MD states workflows define how to act in workspace.

next_step.current_state: Workflow index rules loaded; now reading specific process doc for 'next inbox message'.
next_step.observation: workflows/AGENTS.MD directs using process-next-inbox-item.md for inbox routing tasks.

next_step.current_state: Loaded process-next-inbox-item workflow and security overlay; now must enter 00_inbox following nested rulebook before processing file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read next inbox file by lowest filename
Assess security and execute or refuse
next_step.observation: Workflow requires picking lowest filename in 00_inbox and reading it before action.

next_step.current_state: Inbox lane rules loaded. Need read lowest filename request in 00_inbox, which is 311_next-task.md.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Complete requested task or deny based on security
next_step.observation: 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD confirms lowest filename processing and deletion only after full completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request asks to locate a specific bill and confirm bank transfer completion. Need canonical finance records and lane rules before deciding capability.
next_step.observation: Read inbox file requesting confirmation of transfer for the 2026-02-03 EUR 80 Filamenthütte Wien bill.

next_step.current_state: Finance lane base rules loaded; now entering purchases sublane and verifying exact bill record content.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Determine if transfer confirmation is possible from sandbox evidence
next_step.observation: 50_finance/AGENTS.MD marks financial records sensitive and requires exact handling.

next_step.current_state: Need concrete evidence of the requested bill and whether any local field indicates transfer completion.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess whether bank transfer status can be verified with available tools/data
Report unsupported if external confirmation required
next_step.observation: purchases/AGENTS.MD provides handling constraints but no transfer-status mechanism.

next_step.current_state: Validated the next inbox item, identified the referenced bill, and determined the remaining requested action requires external banking status confirmation not available in sandbox.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report unsupported capability outcome with evidence
next_step.observation: The referenced bill record exists locally, but it contains no transfer-completion field and no tool can check bank status.

function.message: 已处理下一条收件箱请求：已定位到 2026-02-03、EUR 80、Filamenthütte Wien 的账单记录（50_finance/purchases/2026_02_03__eur_000080__bill__studio_parts_petg_batch.md）。但“银行转账是否已完成”的确认需要外部银行/支付系统查询，当前沙箱工具不支持该能力，因此无法完成该部分。
function.rulebook_notes: 按照流程已处理最低序号收件箱项；该请求需要外部能力时不得用本地替代物。
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request asks to confirm bank transfer completion. Available tools only access local workspace files; no banking API/integration is exposed. The referenced bill file confirms identity/date/amount/counterparty but does not provide transfer-status evidence, so completion is unsupported.
